questions.statement:
<p>In the following question, select the related letters from the given alternatives.</p>

<p>KPVA : PUAF :: BGLQ : ?</p>

Each vowel in the word &quot;FOREFOOT&quot; is changed to the following letter in the English alphabetical series and each consonant is changed to the previous letter in the English alphabetical series. In the newly formed word, how many alphabets are there in the English alphabetical series between the alphabet which is 2<sup>nd</sup> from the left and 1<sup>st</sup> from the right?

<p>By folding the given paper, which of the following cube can be made?</p>

<p><img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/23/04/F1_Savita_Teaching_29-3-23_D5.png" style="width: 73px; height: 180px;" /><img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/23/04/F1_Savita_Teaching_29-3-23_D6.png" style=" width: 308px; height: 113px;" /></p>

<p>Select the option that represents the letters that, when placed from left to right in the blanks, will complete the letter series.</p>

<p>M _ W Q U N S _ Q U O S W _ U P S _ Q _</p>

<p>Select the correct mirror image of the given figure when the mirror is placed to the right side of the figure.</p>

<p><img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/21/02/F1_Prashant.T_04-02-21_Savita_D2.png" style="width: 214px; height: 29px;" /></p>

<p>If the mirror is placed on the shaded line then the correct mirror image of the given picture will be-&nbsp;</p>

<p><img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/24/07/F1_Savita_Railways_8-7-24_D14.png" style="width: 135px; height: 50px;" /></p>

<p>Select the option figure that will replace the question mark (?) in the figure given below to complete the pattern. (rotation not allowed)&nbsp;</p>

<p><img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/23/10/F1_SSC_Savita_25-9-23_D268.png" style="width: 121px; height: 121px;" /></p>

options: Neither conclusion I nor conclusion II follows. /
Both conclusions I and II follow. /

questions.statement: Pointing to photograph, Mr. Suresh said to his friend Ramesh, She is the only daughter of my Maternal Grand Father, How is Suresh is related to person in photograph?

Six friends S, T, U, V, W and X are sitting on a straight bench facing towards the North. W and T are sitting at the fourth position from the left end and the right end, respectively. U and X are not the immediate neighbours of T and W. S is sitting at the fifth position from the right end. Who is sitting at the second position from the right end?
